zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Leveson III , of Wolverhampton and Willenhall於1315年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾維倫哈爾時，他的父親Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall29歲，母親Margery Clements23歲。他與Mrs Edith Leveson結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1346年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: Leveson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu).

variants.name: Levison
meanings: English: variant of Leveson, from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu, from lēof ‘dear, beloved’ + sunu ‘son’).

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: Leverson
meanings: Altered form of Jewish   Levison   or   Levinson  .

variants.name: Lowson
meanings: 1 English, Scottish: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Low, a pet form of Laurence ( see Lawrence ) + -son. Compare Lawson , Larson , and Lorrison .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Leveson III , of Wolverhampton and Willenhall was born in 1315, in Willenhall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall, was 29 and his mother, Margery Clements, was 23. He married Mrs Edith Leveson. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1346, in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Leveson III , of Wolverhampton and Willenhall est né en 1315, à Willenhall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margery Clements, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Edith Leveson. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1346, à Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Leveson III , of Wolverhampton and Willenhall 1315 in Willenhall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall 29 und seine Mutter Margery Clements 23. Er hat Mrs Edith Leveson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1346 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Leveson III , of Wolverhampton and Willenhall è nato il nel 1315 nel Willenhall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margery Clements, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Edith Leveson. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1346, nel Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Leveson III , of Wolverhampton and Willenhall(이)가 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 윌렌홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Clements(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Mrs Edith Leveson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 울버함프턴에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Leveson III , of Wolverhampton and Willenhall nasceu em 1315, em Willenhall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margery Clements, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Edith Leveson. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1346, em Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Leveson III , of Wolverhampton and Willenhall родился в 1315 г. в местности уилленолл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Clements, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Edith Leveson. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1346 г. в местности волвирамптон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Leveson III , of Wolverhampton and Willenhall nació en 1315, en Willenhall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margery Clements, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Mrs Edith Leveson. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1346, en Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años.
